name: {number} prompts de fotos de mujeres embarazadas | fotografía de maternidad
summary: Crea imágenes de maternidad hermosas e inspiradoras que celebran el embarazo con elegancia y gracia. 📷 Nuestro libro de prompts, cuidadosamente elaborado, incluye {number} prompts probados y optimizados para Nano Banana, totalmente compatibles con herramientas de referencia de personajes para obtener resultados consistentes y auténticos. ⚡ Descarga digital instantánea.
description: Este completo libro de prompts contiene {number} prompts de IA meticulosamente diseñados, creados específicamente para generar fotografías de maternidad auténticas y hermosas que capturan la belleza, el brillo y la importancia emocional del embarazo.
why: Professional maternity photography shoots cost $800–$2,500+ per session. Add maternity wardrobe styling ($300–$800), professional hair and makeup ($200–$500), location scouting and fees ($200–$800), lighting equipment, props, and professional editing ($150–$400 per image)—you're easily investing $2,000–$4,000+ for a comprehensive maternity photo collection.And maternity is time-sensitive. Your pregnancy window is finite. If you miss the perfect timing, you can't recreate it. Professional shoots can be booked months in advance, leaving expectant mothers stressed about timing and availability.But what if you could generate stunning, professional-quality maternity photos whenever you want—instantly, for a fraction of the cost, with complete creative control? ✨
prompt: a pregnant woman standing gracefully in a minimal photo studio, wearing a soft white chiffon gown with flowing translucent layers, fabric gently lifted around her as if caught by a breeze, elegant fine-art maternity portrait, calm expression, subtle side lighting, smooth gray seamless background, cinematic softness, natural tones, delicate shadows, high-end fashion editorial style, ultra-detailed fabric folds, realistic light diffusion, shot on Canon EOS R5 with 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, 8k high resolution
